class.name: PlayFab
class.brief_description: Root singleton for PlayFab services integration.
class.description: PlayFab is the engine singleton that owns the PlayFab runtime, shared async dispatch, user sign-in, Game Saves, leaderboards, and generated client-safe PlayFab service surfaces. Configure [code]playfab/titleid[/code] in Project Settings before calling [method initialize]. By default the addon pumps completions automatically each process frame through [code]playfab/runtime/embed_dispatch[/code]; call [method dispatch] manually when that setting is disabled.

method.name: initialize
method.description: Initializes the PlayFab runtime using [code]playfab/titleid[/code] and [code]playfab/endpoint[/code] from Project Settings. Returns a [PlayFabResult] describing success or failure.

method.name: shutdown
method.description: Shuts down the PlayFab runtime and clears cached user state.

method.name: is_available
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the PlayFab runtime is available on the current platform.

method.name: is_initialized
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the PlayFab runtime has been successfully initialized.

method.name: dispatch
method.description: Manually pumps the PlayFab async task queue. Use this when [code]playfab/runtime/embed_dispatch[/code] is disabled or when deterministic completion timing is required.

method.name: get_last_error
method.description: Returns the most recent PlayFab runtime error.

method.name: get_users
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabUsers] service for manual sign-in and cached PlayFab user lookup.

method.name: get_game_saves
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabGameSaves] service for PlayFab Game Saves sync, upload, and quota queries.

method.name: get_leaderboards
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabLeaderboards] service for score submission and leaderboard queries.

method.name: get_accounts
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabAccounts] service for generated account, profile, and identity APIs.

method.name: get_catalog
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabCatalog] service for generated catalog APIs.

method.name: get_cloud_script
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabCloudScript] service for generated CloudScript execution APIs.

method.name: get_entity_data
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabEntityData] service for generated entity object and file APIs.

method.name: get_events
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabEvents] service reserved for generated event and telemetry APIs.

method.name: get_experimentation
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabExperimentation] service for generated experimentation APIs.

method.name: get_friends
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabFriends] service for generated friends-list APIs.

method.name: get_groups
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabGroups] service for generated group membership and role APIs.

method.name: get_inventory
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabInventory] service for generated inventory APIs.

method.name: get_localization
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabLocalization] service for generated localization APIs.

method.name: get_player_data
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabPlayerData] service for generated player data APIs.

method.name: get_statistics
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabStatistics] service for generated statistic APIs.

method.name: get_title_data
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabTitleData] service for generated title data APIs.

method.name: sign_in_with_xuser_async
method.description: Starts manual PlayFab sign-in for a signed-in [code]GDKUser[/code]. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; the emitted [PlayFabResult] data contains the signed-in [PlayFabUser].

method.name: sign_in_with_custom_id_async
method.description: Starts PlayFab sign-in using a title-defined custom id. Await the returned completion [Signal] directly; the emitted [PlayFabResult] data contains a [PlayFabUser] with [member PlayFabUser.custom_id] populated and no local Xbox user handle.

method.name: get_user_by_local_id
method.description: Returns the cached [PlayFabUser] for the given local Xbox user id, or [code]null[/code] if no PlayFab session is cached.

method.name: get_user_by_custom_id
method.description: Returns the cached [PlayFabUser] for the given custom id, or [code]null[/code] if no custom-ID PlayFab session is cached.

method.name: get_title_id
method.description: Returns the configured PlayFab title id currently in use by the runtime.

method.name: get_endpoint
method.description: Returns the configured PlayFab endpoint currently in use by the runtime.

members.member: The [PlayFabUsers] service instance for manual sign-in and cached session lookup.
The [PlayFabGameSaves] service instance for Game Saves sync, upload, and cloud state queries.
The [PlayFabLeaderboards] service instance for score submission and leaderboard queries.
The [PlayFabAccounts] service instance for generated account, profile, and identity APIs.
The [PlayFabCatalog] service instance for generated catalog APIs.
The [PlayFabCloudScript] service instance for generated CloudScript execution APIs.
The [PlayFabEntityData] service instance for generated entity object and file APIs.
The [PlayFabEvents] service instance reserved for generated event and telemetry APIs.
The [PlayFabExperimentation] service instance for generated experimentation APIs.
The [PlayFabFriends] service instance for generated friends-list APIs.
The [PlayFabGroups] service instance for generated group membership and role APIs.
The [PlayFabInventory] service instance for generated inventory APIs.
The [PlayFabLocalization] service instance for generated localization APIs.
The [PlayFabPlayerData] service instance for generated player data APIs.
The [PlayFabStatistics] service instance for generated statistic APIs.
The [PlayFabTitleData] service instance for generated title data APIs.
The PlayFab title id used by the runtime.
The PlayFab endpoint used by the runtime.

signal.name: initialized
signal.description: Emitted when the PlayFab runtime has been successfully initialized.

signal.name: shutdown_completed
signal.description: Emitted when the PlayFab runtime has completed shutdown.

signal.name: runtime_error
signal.description: Emitted when a runtime error occurs in PlayFab.
